The code in Python would be:

class Solution:
    def longestDecomposition(self, text: str) -> int:
        n = len(text)
        left = 0
        right = n - 1
        res = 0
        while left <= right:
            found = False
            max_l = (right - left + 1) // 2
            for l in range(1, max_l + 1):
                if text[left:left + l] == text[right - l + 1: right + 1]:
                    res += 2
                    left += l
                    right -= l
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                res += 1
                break
        return res

The code is as follows:

class Solution:
    def longestDecomposition(self, text: str) -> int:
        left = 0
        right = len(text) - 1
        res = 0
        while left <= right:
            found = False
            max_l = (right - left + 1) // 2
            for l in range(1, max_l + 1):
                if text[left:left + l] == text[right - l + 1: right + 1]:
                    res += 2
                    left += l
                    right -= l
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                res += 1
                break
        return res

def longestDecomposition(self, text: str) -> int:
        n = len(text)
        left = 0
        right = n - 1
        res = 0
        while left <= right:
            found = False
            max_l = (right - left + 1) // 2
            for l in range(1, max_l + 1):
                if text[left:left + l] == text[right - l + 1: right + 1]:
                    res += 2
                    left += l
                    right -= l
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                res += 1
                break
        return res

class Solution:
    def longestDecomposition(self, text: str) -> int:
        left = 0
        right = len(text) - 1
        res = 0
        while left <= right:
            found = False
            max_l = (right - left + 1) // 2
            for l in range(1, max_l + 1):
                if text[left:left + l] == text[right - l + 1: right + 1]:
                    res += 2
                    left += l
                    right -= l
                    found = True
                    break
            if not found:
                res += 1
                break
        return res
